title: AI Fairytale Storybook
description: Turns a photo into a soft classic fairytale storybook illustration.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a classic fairytale storybook illustration. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity, facial structure, pose, camera angle, framing, clothing color cues, and scene context. Add soft hand-painted detail, gentle paper texture, warm magical light, whimsical environmental accents, and an inviting illustrated-book mood without text.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, copied existing characters, changed identity, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, horror, harsh neon, low quality, blurry, photorealistic skin
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. enchanted forest storybook, soft painted paper...
